5bb60cbc88a45011a8235cc5.description: Survive and extract on Interchange 7 times

tour.name: Tour
tour.description: Starting quest - automatically unlocked at the beginning of the storyline

objectives.description: Escape Ground Zero

Collect the required 250,000 Roubles

rewards.description: Unlocks achievement Pathfinder, traders (Skier, Mechanic, Prapor, Peacekeeper), and direct access to all locations

falling-skies.name: Falling Skies
falling-skies.description: Best method: Keep doing Tour until completing Mechanic's quest, then go to the broken plane in Woods
falling-skies.notes: Keeping the armored case results in -0.3 Prapor reputation.

objectives.description: Locate the fallen plane
Reach Loyalty Level 2 with Prapor
Ask the traders about the fallen plane

Retrieve the flash drive from one of the G-Wagon SUVs

Retrieve the armored case
Hand over the armored case to Prapor
Keep the armored case for yourself
Hand over cash to Therapist 2,000$

batya.name: Batya
batya.description: Turns out BEAR didn't send just regular squads into Tarkov, there were real SOF guys here. I'd like to know more about those units and what exactly they were doing.

objectives.description: Locate the traces of the BEAR special squad
Check BEAR outposts
Learn more about the Bogatyr squad from the traders
Locate the Gnezdo outpost
objectives.notes: The outpost is in the forest on the western side of the Ultra mall

objectives.description: Figure out what happened to the Bogatyr squad
Learn more about the Bogatyr squad's members
Locate the Ryabina outpost
objectives.notes: It should be somewhere on the ridge in the Priozersk forest, it was used as an observation point

objectives.description: Find more information about the Bogatyr squad
Locate the Carousel outpost

blue-fire.name: Blue Fire
blue-fire.description: Find flyer at any of these locations: Woods med camp (inside a green container taped to a white drawer), Interchange new area flyer, or Interchange big Terragroup area behind old co-op extract (med tent/bunker)
blue-fire.notes: Planting the device takes 60 seconds. Selling the fragment yields 1.5M roubles.

objectives.description: Locate and obtain the device fragment
Talk to Mechanic about the EMP blast
Locate and obtain the device fragment in Chek 13
Talk to Mechanic
Plant the hacking device in the server room in The Lab
Hand over the fragment of Item 1156 to Mechanic
Keep the fragment of Item 1156 for yourself
Find a lead on Item 1156 (if fragment was sold)

they-are-already-here.name: They Are Already Here
they-are-already-here.description: Complete any ONE of these: Kill cultist, Loot dorms marked room, Get note next to cultist circle in abandoned village, or Fisherman island on Shoreline where the green box is

the-labyrinth.name: The Labyrinth
the-labyrinth.description: Go into the access tunnel in Shoreline Resort Basement. Requires: Knossos key.
the-labyrinth.notes: Extremely dangerous area; includes traps, poison, tripwires, and miniboss versions of Tagilla and possibly Killa.

objectives.description: Accept Mechanic's quest 'Shady Contractor'
Visit Therapist for information
Visit Jaeger and negotiate help
Wait 48 hours for keycards
Collect 2 Labrys access keycards
Reach the Labyrinth via Shoreline Health Resort
Disable starting-room trap to exit
Navigate the Labyrinth hazards
Survive enemy waves
Defeat Shadow of Tagilla
Survive potential Killa ambush

the-ticket.name: The Ticket
the-ticket.description: Branches into 4 endings based on player decisions: Savior (help Kerman), Fallen (betray Kerman), Survivor (pay Prapor), Debtor (seek Lightkeeper)
the-ticket.notes: Decision points are mutually exclusive. The armored case choice in Falling Skies affects available optional objectives (Lightkeeper access).

objectives.description: Obtain Intelligence Center level 1
Talk to Mr. Kerman
Wait for Mr. Kerman to reach out
Talk to Prapor
Talk to Mr. Kerman
Ask Mechanic for help with the armored case
Obtain the experimental signal jammer
Use the signal jammer to unlock the armored case
Unlock the armored case
Retrieve the Ticket document from the case
Contact Mr. Kerman about the Ticket
Accept Mr. Kerman's cooperation offer
objectives.notes: Kerman Route — leads to Savior or Fallen ending

objectives.description: Refuse Mr. Kerman's cooperation offer
objectives.notes: Refuse Route — leads to Survivor or Debtor ending

objectives.description: Seek Lightkeeper for Terminal access
